name: Epic Vietnam from North to South 10 days - Group Tour
duration: Places:Hanoi - Ninh Binh - Halong Bay - Hoi An - Da Nang - Ba Na Hills - Ho Chi Minh City - Mekong Delta
highlights: Embark on a mesmerizing cruise through the emerald waters of Ha Long Bay, a UNESCO World Heritage Site.
Step back in time as you wander the lantern-lit streets of Hoi An, renowned for its well-preserved architecture and vibrant culture.
Experience the lush beauty of the Mekong Delta with a cruise along the winding waterways.
Discover the diverse culture and glorious history of the famous landmarks of Ho Chi Minh City.

itinerary.title: Hello Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

Your tour guide will meet you at Noi Bai International Airport and bring you into the heart of the city. Check in at your hotel and relax for the rest of the day. If you want to join any other activities, please contact our consultants for detailed organization. NOTE: Check-in time is 14:00, if you early check-in please require with surcharge.

itinerary.title: Ninh Binh Full-day Excursion (SIC)
itinerary.description:
Morning

Let’s get up early this morning to have breakfast, then get ready for a transfer to Ninh Binh by bus. When arriving in Tam Coc, the famous tourist attraction in Ninh Binh, you can start a 2-hour adventure around the Ngo Dong River in a bamboo boat that is being rowed by locals. On the downstream way, you will have the chance to explore the three large caverns' limestone karst formations, meandering through the rice fields and monasteries on the way to the caves. After all, tourists would stop by a local restaurant for lunch and have signature meals. Afternoon

Spend some time at Hoa L...

itinerary.title: Halong Bay Overnight Cruise (SIC)
itinerary.description:
Morning

After having breakfast in the hotel, around 08:00, our driver will pick you up and transfer you to the cruise port. Around 12:00, let’s embark on the cruise. The crew will kindly greet the visitors with a welcome drink. You can enjoy a lunch of fresh seafood (with vegetarian options) while the boat starts the journey exploring Halong Bay. Afternoon & Night

Enjoy the beauty of the Bay through the rocks, islets, beaches, and hollow islands, which are your once-in-a-lifetime memories

itinerary.title: Halong Bay Exploration - Flight To Da Nang
itinerary.description:
Morning

Waking up a bit early might be a good choice because you might have the chance to attend a yoga or Tai Chi class. After the morning exercise, you should begin your day by visiting some of the distinctive islands, such as Sail Island, Fisherman's Head Rock, and Turtle Islet. NOTE: The specific schedule depends on each cruise. Noon

After your morning trip, you will return to the ship and complete the check-in procedure. While the ship is making its way toward the land, enjoy your last lunch on the cruise

itinerary.title: Hoi An Half-day City Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

Your journey begins at the vibrant Hoi An Market, a lively hub full of colorful stalls, fragrant foods, handmade goods, and the cheerful buzz of daily life. Just a short walk away is the Phuc Kien Chinese Assembly Hall, known for its striking gate, dragon sculptures, and beautifully detailed roof. Here, you’ll gain insight into ancestor worship as you observe the family altar and see locals making offerings. From there, you’ll explore some of Hoi An’s well-preserved ancient houses, including Phung Hung and Tan Ky, both standing strong for over 200 years and offering a glimpse into tra...

itinerary.title: Da Nang - Ba Na Hills (SIC)
itinerary.description:
Morning

Between 07:45 and 08:00, we'll take you up from your Hoi An hotel to get to the spectacular Ba Na Hills. You will check in at the Suoi Mo Cable Car Station to begin your day. From there, take a cable car to Marseille Station and take in the breathtaking views of the mountains in the area. After reaching Ba Na Hills, you should not miss these top places:

The great experience you can get is the chance to explore the renowned Golden Bridge. Two enormous stone hands support this magnificent pedestrian bridge, which provides beautiful views of the hills and woodlands nearby

itinerary.title: Da Nang - Ho Chi Minh City Tour (SIC)
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast and ensure all your belongings are packed before noon so you can check out. Transfer to Da Nang International Airport in preparation for your trip to Ho Chi Minh City. You will be greeted by our driver when you arrive at Tan Son Nhat International Airport, and they will accompany you to your hotel in the center of the city. Afternoon

Start your half-day tour in Ho Chi Minh City with these must-see attractions. These two impressive structures in Saigon, the Old Post Office and Notre Dame Cathedral, both of which have renowned French colonial architecture
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Explore Mekong Delta
itinerary.description:
Morning

At 08:00, we will embark from Ho Chi Minh City and make our way to My Tho, a charming village on the Mekong River's left bank. The activities you might follow are:

Visit the most famous Buddhist temple in Tien Giang province, which dates back to the 19th century, the Vinh Trang Pagoda. Take the sampan out on the river and make your way down it, stopping at some of the enticing islands along the way: Islands with names like Dragon, Unicorn, Phoenix, and Tortoise

Make a pit stop at Unicorn Island to take in the sights of the orchards, sample some exotic fruits, and watch local musicia...
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City - Cu Chi Tunnel (SIC)
itinerary.description:
Morning

At 08:00 in the morning, you should be ready to depart from Ho Chi Minh City for the Cu Chi Tunnels and enjoy the tranquil surroundings during two hours of transfer. At this historical site, you might have the opportunity to learn a lot about the war in Vietnam through these interesting activities. Get an idea of how severe the war was by watching a little documentary film about how these tunnels were used during the war. Try some hot tea, tapioca, and rice since these were the main rations given to local soldiers throughout the war

Visit the neighborhood range and see if you can bor...
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast will be served at the hotel, and you will have some free time before being transferred to Tan Son Nhat Airport for your next tour.

included: Overnight in shared Twin/ Double room with air-conditioning (AC) at hotel.
All transport during a tour on air-conditioned vehicle as per itinerary (including airport pick up & see off)
All in-tour stationed local English-speaking guide.
Meals as indicated in the program
2 domestic flights Hanoi – Da Nang and Da Nang – Ho Chi Minh City
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
